raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "71% of people who left prison in California in the last six months of 2019 were released without a California Identification Card (Cal-ID).",
    "The lack of a Cal-ID has significant negative impacts on formerly incarcerated individuals, including missed job opportunities and difficulties in opening bank accounts.",
    "Many other states, including Illinois, Oregon, Michigan, and New Jersey, provide free birth certificates to incarcerated individuals upon their release.",
    "In California, obtaining a Cal-ID card often requires a birth certificate to prove legal presence and date of birth.",
    "The difficulty in obtaining necessary documentation, such as a birth certificate, poses major barriers for individuals leaving incarceration in California.",
    "70% of unhoused individuals in California were previously incarcerated.",
    "Access to vital records, such as birth certificates, is crucial for formerly incarcerated individuals to secure housing and enter the labor market."
  ]
}
```
